create.title: Creation Center
create.subtitle: Generate images or videos with AI

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Explore AI-driven creativity
features.imageGenDesc: Based on Agnes Image 2.0/2.1 Flash models, supports text-to-image, image-to-image, multi-image composite
features.videoGenDesc: Based on Agnes Video V2.0 model, supports text-to-video, image-to-video, keyframes animation
features.promptOptDesc: One-click prompt optimization for better AI generation results

hero.title:
Unleash Infinite AI Creativity
Images · Videos · Prompt Optimization
hero.subtitle: Powered by Sapiens AI Agnes models. Pure frontend + Serverless architecture for professional-grade image and video generation.

imageGen.title: AI Image Generation
imageGen.subtitle: Based on Agnes Image 2.0/2.1 Flash models
imageGen.desc20: 2.0: Fast generation, ideal for quick ideation and image editing
imageGen.desc21: 2.1: High-density image optimization, ideal for complex visual details and rich compositions
imageGen.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate, e.g.: A cat sitting on the moon, cyberpunk style
imageGen.demoWarning: ⚠️ Demo mode (no API Key configured). Visit the Settings page to configure Agnes API Key for real AI generation.
imageGen.uploadHint: Drag or click to upload reference image(s)
imageGen.uploadMultiHint: Upload multiple reference images, the model will composite them into one new image
imageGen.imageRequired: Image-to-image requires at least one reference image
imageGen.fillPromptAndClickGenerate: Fill in the prompt and click Generate
imageGen.apiKeyRequired: Please configure Agnes API Key in Settings first

videoGen.title: AI Video Generation
videoGen.subtitle: Based on Agnes Video V2.0 model · Async task API
videoGen.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to generate, e.g.: A cat walk on the beach at sunset, cinematic shot, soft ocean waves
videoGen.dropImageHint: Drag or click to upload reference image
videoGen.dropImagesHint: Upload multiple reference images for video generation
videoGen.negativePlaceholder: Describe content to avoid, e.g.: blurry, distorted, watermark
videoGen.emptyState: Fill in the description and click 「Generate Video」

settings.title: API Key Settings
settings.desc: Configure Sapiens AI (Agnes) API Key. The API Key is stored only in your browser's localStorage and is not uploaded to any server.
settings.agnesDesc: For Agnes Image 2.0/2.1 Flash and Agnes Video V2.0 models.
securityTips: API Key is stored only in your browser (localStorage)
We never upload your API Key to any server
All API calls go through a server-side proxy (Key is never exposed to frontend)
Rotate your API Key periodically for security
Get API Key: Visit Agnes AI Documentation
settings.demoDesc: When no API Key is configured, the app returns placeholder images (demo mode). After configuring the API Key, real Agnes AI models will be called to generate content.

sponsor.title: ☕ Sponsor
sponsor.desc: This project is completely free and open source. If this tool saved you time, sparked creative ideas, or you simply find it useful, feel free to sponsor as you wish.
sponsor.guide1: Every sponsorship directly motivates me to keep maintaining, adapting more Agnes capabilities, and optimizing user experience.
sponsor.guide2: No matter the amount, every sponsor is the greatest recognition and encouragement to an open source author 💙
sponsor.guide3: No sponsorship is totally fine too — a Star is already more than enough.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Agnes Easy Use. All rights reserved.

history.title: Generation History
history.emptyDesc: Records will appear here after image generation
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
